ogTitle: Upper Taylors Arm vs Upper Turon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Taylors Arm and Upper Turon.
heading: Upper Taylors Arm vs Upper Turon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Taylors Arm, New South Wales and Upper Turon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Turon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Upper Taylors Arm (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Taylors Arm or Upper Turon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Taylors Arm has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Upper Turon scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Taylors Arm scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Turon scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Taylors Arm or Upper Turon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Turon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
